Josh Vaage

Software Engineer. Open Source & Projects.

Josh / whaleen

I build small, fast tools with strong UX and clear product edges.

What I'm Working On

  • Writing-focused desktop apps with Tauri + TypeScript
  • Solana apps/tools via @nothingdao
  • Experimental early-stage ideas in orthfx

Where To Look

  • Solana work: github.com/nothingdao
  • WIP lab: github.com/orthfx
